title: Legendares Weapons
description: Feel power with new and unique weapons!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8759596738ba739e2717d3b4f0f2e4f221ba84ed.jpeg)

Legendares Weapons is a mod that adds new powerful weapons to the game!

Fill your game with 51 new, very unique and epic weapons!

The current version is for Forge 1.19.2, Forge 1.19.4, Forge 1.20.1, NeoForge 1.21.1 and NeoForge 1.21.4



## Version 3.6 added support for multiplayer!
##




![ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a03f5fce51585e67757a058b120996abd1fa010.png)


Easily level the terrain with Planarion!


![jhjgfdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae272905aa2dd29b228b52a08a37e5a55bbfd16.gif)

Create a farming dome with Chronis!


![bb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/088f38c90a8a295d019a4b0557be22377f8c3b1a.gif)

This dome accelerates the growth of the plants inside it and also automatically waters them!

![ff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5f1a89c10b9776cc6923d07a1e340c1dac5e1bf.png)

Move structures with Movum!

![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23242f0b16893b3e155158534dbb2a327efc8a9e.gif)


"Did you ever played checkers with a creeper?"
 "I-I-.... wait... WHA-"

 ![qq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82ba793725007878007af4a8de48420c3b14674.gif)

 ![cc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49e2a6571f570b3f7c3df24efb82abf81667306.gif)

 Loser dies! - Challenge mobs to a duel with CheckersGame Weapon!


![zz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da7cea317dda49aa898b7d343a0c91071f864c52.gif)

Quick wood harvesting with Timberlash!


![dd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9140bd7e1cf2bd08bc66b296eb07bfea033990e8.gif)

Climb walls with Scalaris!


![aa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4856270ad2426d25b6bace0f28b661f27eb02748.gif)

Or the ceiling!


![lll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc05d6d81354d78ede318c58f88a15c38bd5878.gif)

Play bowling against mobs with Brutanizer!


![qq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff5cba22c570cb379ffb84546909410248b1f65.gif)


FIND EVERY ORE WITH OREUS!


![sss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcc48789e1c420994fcb34fe41740854653a17a5.gif)


![xx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8a5d46011c3b6bb966374b500c46c6e15088fd3.png)


EVERYTHING YOU NEED IN ONE PLACE WITH AIO!


![aio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1c0b9862cd8aa9075f2a7127b2a6ae56d713bf8.gif)


DON'T WASTE TIME FOR SMELTING. USE VEINWEAVER!


![bbb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e1e6f75b352932f0d9a9e434042e38f2e485f4.gif)


HARD SITUATION? NOT FOR CARETHIUM!


![bb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5753150f23c22bfa73e9fc0b07ab6ca28885fccf.gif)


MORPH INTO SLIME AND CRUSH YOUR ENEMIES! WITH MORBOSPHAERA


![qq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c41a412760a3de4007cdaa2feeacc08e96854c6.gif)


BE A ENDER DRAGON! (WITH ENDIVORA)


![pp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d596d52cd80e6bf87ad1b5e509f2aa6abf60f13.gif)


![ee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9810cbcb534cd658fb2aa10b6014fdeb4b0ea676.png)


DESTINATUS


![nn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0897b5c4c5046f620e67775a57c7860f2851d910.gif)


ARMAGEDDONIS


![lll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e3da9814952ca7864efef9e3f861960b6cf6821.gif)


OCEAN MINER


![mm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29ce78d3bda5373b69124b66c4026a628a2aba95.gif)

AND MUCH MORE WEAPONS!

All wands add something different and will stand out from other mods. 

HAVE FUN!

You can also use this mod in modpacks.
